task_completion.description: Import a quiz from the Assessment Tool into SEB Server.
task_completion.visual_evidence: SEB Server web interface showing an imported exam or quiz listed in the Exams section or the Exam details page.

task_completion.description: Configure a 'Last Ping Time' indicator named 'Latency Monitor' with specific thresholds on the exam instance.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Exam instance monitoring configuration page showing an indicator named 'Latency Monitor' of type 'Last Ping Time' with a warning threshold of 4000 and a danger threshold of 10000.

task_completion.description: Configure a 'Warning-Log Counter' indicator named 'Integrity Alert' with specific thresholds on the exam instance.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Exam instance monitoring configuration page showing an indicator named 'Integrity Alert' of type 'Warning-Log Counter' with a warning threshold of 2 and a danger threshold of 5.

task_completion.description: Create a dedicated exam proctor account for David Kim.
task_completion.visual_evidence: User management or accounts page showing a user created with the name 'David Kim', username 'med.proctor', and email 'd.kim@nbme.gov'.

task_completion.description: Assign the 'Exam Supporter' role to the proctor account and activate it.
task_completion.visual_evidence: User details or list view showing the 'med.proctor' account has the 'Exam Supporter' role assigned and its status is set to active.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the SEB Server web interface rather than using terminal commands or direct database queries.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the SEB Server UI at localhost:8080 to perform the configurations.

integrity.description: The monitoring indicators were added directly to the exam instance, not to a global template.
integrity.visual_evidence: The indicators are visible within the specific Exam's configuration or details page, rather than in a general 'Monitoring Templates' section.

integrity.description: The agent entered the information into the actual application forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Data entry (username, thresholds, indicator names) is visible inside the SEB Server input fields, not just typed into a text editor or terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected username for the proctor account must be exactly 'med.proctor'. The expected monitoring indicators added to the exam instance must be named exactly 'Latency Monitor' and 'Integrity Alert'.
